introduction: Follow these steps to manipulate data within a table.

steps.title: Step 1: Insert Records
steps.content: Add new data to the table using the INSERT statement.
steps.code: INSERT INTO Employees (EmpID, Name, Salary) VALUES (101, 'John Doe', 50000);

steps.title: Step 2: Select Data
steps.content: Retrieve and view the data you just inserted.

steps.title: Step 3: Update Records
steps.content: Modify the salary of the employee using UPDATE.
steps.code: UPDATE Employees SET Salary = 55000 WHERE EmpID = 101;

steps.title: Step 4: Delete Records
steps.content: Remove the employee record from the table.

expectedOutcomes: Specific rows conditionally updated without affecting others.
